etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "justify" + "-ed" from Latin "justificare" (to make righteous)

etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Make righteous → righteous vindicated → contemporary justified righteousness and justified vindicated with righteous presence
